description: Audit allowlist for known-accepted npm advisories. Each entry must have a justification and expiration date.

allowedAdvisories.justification: jsPDF used only for local PDF export; no user-supplied HTML/untrusted input processed. Monitoring for upstream fix.
DoS risk accepted — local desktop app, no server-side exposure.
Path traversal not exploitable — app generates PDFs from internal data only.
AcroForm not used in our PDF exports. No user-controlled form fields.
BMP decoder not used — app does not process BMP images via jsPDF.
XMP metadata injection — app controls all metadata, no untrusted input.
Race condition in addJS — plugin not used in our export flow.
PDF AcroForm injection advisory accepted short-term for local export-only flow; no untrusted form/script payloads are ingested.
addJS object-injection advisory accepted short-term; addJS is not used in app-generated PDFs.
GIF-dimension DoS advisory accepted short-term; app does not process untrusted GIF payloads for server-side workflows.

ReDoS via repeated wildcards (GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26). Dev-only dependency — used by eslint, electron-builder, node-gyp at build time. Not in production bundle. Upstream fix requires minimatch >=10.2.1; blocked by eslint@9, electron-builder@26, and typescript-eslint@8 locking older versions.
Transitive dep of minimatch ReDoS advisory. Dev-only (eslint, electron-builder).
